name: station-hallways
description: Connected hallways, T-junction, server room, and observation room

commands.code: AFRAME.registerComponent("station-hallways",{init(){const g=this.el.object3D;const W=0x0d1117,P=0x141a22,C=0x1a2030,F=0x0a0e14;const wallM=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:W,roughness:0.6,metalness:0.8});const panelM=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:P,roughness:0.5,metalness:0.7});const condM=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:C,roughness:0.3,metalness:0.9});const floorM=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:F,roughness:0.7,metalness:0.6});const accentM=()=>new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x00ffaa,transparent:true,opacity:0.15});const blueM=()=>new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x0066ff,transparent:true,opacity:0.25});const warnM=()=>new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0xff8800,transparent:true,opacity:0.12});const frameM=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x1a1f28,roughness:0.3,metalness:0.9});function box(w,h,d,mat,x,y,z){var m=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(w,h,d),mat);m.position.set(x,y,z);g.add(m);return m;}function cyl(r,len,mat,x,y,z,rx,ry,rz){var m=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.CylinderGeometry(r,r,len,8),mat);m.position.set(x,y,z);if(rx)m.rotation.x=rx;if(ry)m.rotation.y=ry;if(rz)m.rotation.z=rz;g.add(m);}function corridor(x1,z1,x2,z2,ceilH){var dx=x2-x1,dz=z2-z1;var len=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dz*dz);var cx=(x1+x2)/2,cz=(z1+z2)/2;var ang=Math.atan2(dx,dz);var isX=Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dz);var cw=1.2;if(isX){box(Math.abs(dx),0.02,cw,floorM,cx,0,cz);box(Math.abs(dx),0.05,cw+0.1,wallM.clone(),cx,ceilH,cz);box(Math.abs(dx),ceilH,0.04,wallM.clone(),cx,ceilH/2,cz-cw/2);box(Math.abs(dx),ceilH,0.04,wallM.clone(),cx,ceilH/2,cz+cw/2);for(var i=0;i<Math.abs(dx)/0.8;i++){var xx=x1+(dx>0?1:-1)*(i*0.8+0.4);box(0.01,0.4,cw-0.1,new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x00ffaa,transparent:true,opacity:0.04}),xx,0.005,cz);}cyl(0.02,Math.abs(dx),condM,cx,ceilH-0.15,cz-cw/2+0.06,0,0,Math.PI/2);cyl(0.02,Math.abs(dx),condM,cx,ceilH-0.15,cz+cw/2-0.06,0,0,Math.PI/2);box(Math.abs(dx),0.005,0.04,accentM(),cx,ceilH-0.06,cz);}else{box(cw,0.02,Math.abs(dz),floorM,cx,0,cz);box(cw+0.1,0.05,Math.abs(dz),wallM.clone(),cx,ceilH,cz);box(0.04,ceilH,Math.abs(dz),wallM.clone(),cx-cw/2,ceilH/2,cz);box(0.04,ceilH,Math.abs(dz),wallM.clone(),cx+cw/2,ceilH/2,cz);for(var i=0;i<Math.abs(dz)/0.8;i++){var zz=z1+(dz>0?1:-1)*(i*0.8+0.4);box(cw-0.1,0.01,0.4,new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x00ffaa,transparent:true,opacity:0.04}),cx,0.005,zz);}cyl(0.02,Math.abs(dz),condM,cx-cw/2+0.06,ceilH-0.15,cz,Math.PI/2,0,0);cyl(0.02,Math.abs(dz),condM,cx+cw/2-0.06,ceilH-0.15,cz,Math.PI/2,0,0);box(0.04,0.005,Math.abs(dz),accentM(),cx,ceilH-0.06,cz);}}function doorFrame(x,z,rotY){var df=new THREE.Group();var dl=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.06,2.2,0.06),frameM);dl.position.set(-0.45,1.1,0);df.add(dl);var dr=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.06,2.2,0.06),frameM);dr.position.set(0.45,1.1,0);df.add(dr);var dt=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.98,0.06,0.06),frameM);dt.position.set(0,2.22,0);df.add(dt);var gl=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.015,1.8,0.015),blueM());gl.position.set(-0.48,1.1,0);df.add(gl);var gr=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.015,1.8,0.015),blueM());gr.position.set(0.48,1.1,0);df.add(gr);df.position.set(x,0,z);if(rotY)df.rotation.y=rotY;g.add(df);}function room(cx,cz,rw,rd,ceilH){box(rw,0.02,rd,floorM,cx,0,cz);box(rw+0.1,0.05,rd+0.1,wallM.clone(),cx,ceilH,cz);box(0.04,ceilH,rd,wallM.clone(),cx-rw/2,ceilH/2,cz);box(0.04,ceilH,rd,wallM.clone(),cx+rw/2,ceilH/2,cz);box(rw,ceilH,0.04,wallM.clone(),cx,ceilH/2,cz-rd/2);box(rw,ceilH,0.04,wallM.clone(),cx,ceilH/2,cz+rd/2);for(var s=-1;s<=1;s+=2){cyl(0.02,rd,condM,cx+s*(rw/2-0.06),ceilH-0.15,cz,Math.PI/2,0,0);box(0.04,0.005,rd-0.2,accentM(),cx+s*(rw/2-0.02),ceilH-0.06,cz);}for(var i=0;i<3;i++){var pz=cz-rd/2+0.5+i*(rd/3);box(0.01,0.5,0.5,panelM,cx-rw/2+0.02,1.2,pz);box(0.01,0.5,0.5,panelM,cx+rw/2-0.02,1.2,pz);}box(0.04,0.005,rd,new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x00ffaa,transparent:true,opacity:0.06}),cx,ceilH-0.06,cz);}/* MAIN CORRIDOR - through bulkhead, going back */corridor(0,-1.82,0,-7,2.8);/* Door at junction z=-4.5 */doorFrame(0,-4.5,0);/* T-JUNCTION - branch right at z=-4.5 */corridor(0.6,-4.5,4.0,-4.5,2.8);/* Door into right branch */doorFrame(1.2,-4.5,Math.PI/2);/* SIDE ROOM - server/storage room off right branch */room(4.8,-4.5,2.5,3.0,2.8);doorFrame(4.8-2.5/2,-4.5,Math.PI/2);/* End of main corridor - observation room */room(0,-8.5,3.0,2.5,2.8);doorFrame(0,-7.25,0);/* Lights in corridors */for(var z=-2.5;z>=-6.5;z-=1.5){var lt=new THREE.PointLight(0x00ffaa,0.3,2.5);lt.position.set(0,2.6,z);g.add(lt);}/* Light in side corridor */for(var x=1.5;x<=3.5;x+=1.5){var lt=new THREE.PointLight(0x0066ff,0.25,2.5);lt.position.set(x,2.6,-4.5);g.add(lt);}/* Lights in rooms */var lt1=new THREE.PointLight(0x00ffaa,0.4,3);lt1.position.set(4.8,2.5,-4.5);g.add(lt1);var lt2=new THREE.PointLight(0x0088ff,0.4,3);lt2.position.set(0,2.5,-8.5);g.add(lt2);}});var el=document.createElement("a-entity");el.setAttribute("station-hallways","");document.querySelector("a-scene").appendChild(el);console.log("[hot-swap] station-hallways injected");
